title: Western Union Bets on Stablecoins and M&A for Growth
message_html: Western Union Bets on Stablecoins and M&A for Growth ...
snippet: Western Union is looking to stablecoins and merger and acquisition (M&A) activity for growth after a quarter in which revenue was flat due to a decline in the Americas business. During the first quarter, the company’s GAAP revenue was flat year over year while its adjusted revenue was down 1%, accor
